customInstructions: This is the official Previous Year Paper (PYP) of HP Patwari held in 2015.
Total Questions: 100, Total Marks: 100, Total Time: 90 Minutes (1.5 Hours).
There was NO negative marking in this exam.
Questions are available in both English and Hindi (where applicable).

questions.questionEn: Ramesh started a business by investing Rs 38,000. After 5 months Shyam joined by investing Rs 55,000. At the end of the year, there was a profit of Rs 22,000. What is the approximate difference between the profits of Ramesh and Shyam?
questions.questionHi: रमेश ने ₹38,000 लगाकर व्यापार शुरू किया। 5 माह बाद श्याम ₹55,000 की पूंजी लगाकर उसमें शामिल हो गया। वर्ष के अन्त में ₹22,000 का लाभ हुआ। रमेश तथा श्याम के लाभ के मध्य लगभग कितना अन्तर है?

questions.questionEn: An amount of Rs 800 becomes Rs 920 in 3 years at simple interest. If the interest rate is increased by 3%, what does the amount become?
